description: M5: Board Interactions & Undo. Advanced board interactions, undo/redo system, and AI modification indicators.

userStories.title: Drag to move nodes with position persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag board nodes to reposition them on the canvas, so that I can organize my board layout visually.
acceptanceCriteria: User can drag any node to new position
PATCH persists position_x, position_y on drag end
Position updates locally and broadcasts via WebSocket
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § PATCH nodes/:nodeId — position_x, position_y
Design: component-specs.md § 6.1-6.3 — all nodes draggable
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.2.01
Files: BoardCanvas.tsx (onNodeDragStop), api/board.ts (PATCH fn)
Gotchas: Send PATCH only on drag END, not during. WebSocket broadcast server-side.

test_cases: T-3.2.01 | Unit | Drag moves node | Position updates

userStories.title: Group nesting (drag into/out of groups)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag boxes and free text nodes into groups to organize related items, and drag them out to ungroup them.
acceptanceCriteria: Drag node over group sets parent_id via PATCH
Visual feedback shows valid drop zone
Drag out of group clears parent_id
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § parent_id FK
Design: component-specs.md § 6.2 Group Node
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.2.02, T-3.2.03
Files: BoardCanvas.tsx (parent detection), api/board.ts
Gotchas: React Flow doesn't auto-detect parents. Check if node position within group bounds. Groups resizable so width/height dynamic.

test_cases: T-3.2.02 | Drag into group | parent_id set

userStories.title: Node lock toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to lock individual board nodes to prevent accidental edits, so that finalized content remains stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Each node has lock toggle button
Locked nodes cannot be edited or dragged
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § is_locked boolean
Design: component-specs.md § 6.1 Lock icon bottom-right
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.2.07
Files: BoxNode.tsx, GroupNode.tsx, FreeTextNode.tsx (add toggle), api/board.ts
Gotchas: Lock icon already displays (M4). Add interactive button. Set draggable=false when locked.

userStories.title: Multi-select with selection box
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select multiple board nodes at once using Ctrl+drag, so that I can perform batch operations like delete.
userStories.notes:
Architecture: React Flow built-in
Design: component-specs.md § 6.5 Toolbar
Files: BoardCanvas.tsx (enable selectionOnDrag prop)
Gotchas: Set selectionMode='partial', selectionKeyCode='Control'. Delete handler exists.

userStories.title: Undo/redo Redux system
userStories.description: As a user, I want undo/redo functionality for all board actions, so that I can revert mistakes and experiment freely.
acceptanceCriteria: Undo restores previous state, pushes to redo
Undo sends REST PATCH to persist
userStories.notes:
Architecture: tech-stack.md § Board Undo/Redo — frontend Redux only
Design: Redux Toolkit slice with pushAction, undo, redo reducers
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.7.01-05
Files: board-slice.ts (implement reducers), BoardCanvas.tsx (dispatch pushAction), hooks/useBoardUndo.ts
Gotchas: All changes dispatch pushAction. source='user' for M5. Undo restores locally AND sends PATCH. Drop oldest at 101.

api_endpoints: PATCH nodes/:nodeId — restore state on undo

userStories.title: Undo/redo buttons with context-aware labels
userStories.description: As a user, I want undo/redo buttons in the toolbar with labels that reflect whether I'm undoing an AI action or my own action.
acceptanceCriteria: Label: 'Undo AI Action' if stack top source='ai', else 'Undo'
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 6.5 Toolbar — context-aware tooltips
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.7.03
Files: BoardToolbar.tsx (add buttons), board-slice.ts (selectors)
Gotchas: Read stack top source. For M5 all source='user', but prepare for 'ai'.

test_cases: T-3.7.03 | AI action undo label correct

userStories.title: Board item reference insertion to chat
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click the reference button on a board node to insert a reference into the chat input, so that I can explicitly refer to board items in my messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Pin button dispatches custom event (M4 done)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § Chat supports @board[uuid]
Design: component-specs.md § 6.1 Pin button
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.8.01, T-3.8.02
Files: BoxNode.tsx (event done M4), ChatInput.tsx (add listener)
Gotchas: BoxNode already dispatches CustomEvent('board:reference'). ChatInput use setRangeText() at cursor.

userStories.title: AI modification indicators
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a visual indicator on board nodes that the AI has modified, so that I can quickly identify AI changes and acknowledge them.
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § ai_modified_indicator boolean
Design: component-specs.md § 6.1 Gold dot top-left
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.4.01, T-3.4.02
Files: BoxNode.tsx, GroupNode.tsx, FreeTextNode.tsx (add dot), BoardCanvas.tsx (onNodeClick clear)
Gotchas: ai_modified_indicator separate from created_by. No AI modifies board in M5 (M8), this is prep.
